name: pii-scanner

metadata.name: pii-scanner
metadata.summary: A library for scanning Personally Identifiable Information (PII).

functions.name: pii_scanner.utils.clean_text
documentation: Function to clean text before scanning.

methods.name: pii_scanner.scanner.PIIScanner.column_data_pii_scanner
documentation:
Scan the provided data for PII information using MLBasedNERScannerForStructuredData.

```
param data

List of strings to be scanned for PII.

param column_name

Column name to be used for sensitivity detection.

param chunk_size

The size of data chunks to process at a time.
```

methods.name: pii_scanner.scanner.PIIScanner.scan
documentation:
Main function to call the appropriate PII scanner based on the provided inputs.

```
param file_path

Path to the file to be scanned (optional).

param data

List of strings to be scanned for PII (optional).

param sample_size

Proportion of data to sample from the file.

param chunk_size

Number of rows or data units to process at once.

param column_name

Column name to be used for sensitivity detection in data scanning.
```
